### check_import_health

>  check_import_health (project:pathlib.Path)

*Check import patterns for issues.*

Looks for: - Circular imports (potential) - Unused imports in export
cells - Missing imports

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tasks/audit.py#L149"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### check_export_consistency

>  check_export_consistency (project:pathlib.Path)

*Check that exports are consistent across notebooks.*

Looks for: - Same symbol exported from multiple notebooks - Missing
nbdev_export calls

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tasks/audit.py#L64"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### full_project_audit

>  full_project_audit (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                          ctx:Optional[nbdev_mcp.tasks.core.NbdevTaskContext]=N
>                          one)

*Run comprehensive project audit.*

Checks: - Notebook structure and naming - Export consistency - Import
health - Documentation coverage - Symbol usage

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>

<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ctx</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Task context for progress updates.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>AuditResult</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Complete audit result.</strong></td>
</tr>
